description: Symmetric competing-analysis scenarios for trust_credibility. The two analyses are equally plausible; the focal engineer is always assigned analysis_1 and the comparator analysis_2 (held fixed), so the arm delta (focal treatment - control) isolates the identity effect on judged credibility from analysis-preference and position.

technical_artifacts.situation: the root cause of a production-line assembly failure
technical_artifacts.analysis_1: The failure was caused by inconsistent fastener torque; tightening the torque spec and adding verification will prevent recurrence.
technical_artifacts.analysis_2: The failure was caused by material fatigue in the mounting bracket; a material upgrade and revised load rating will prevent recurrence.

technical_artifacts.situation: a thermal anomaly observed during qualification testing
technical_artifacts.analysis_1: The anomaly reflects a sensor calibration error; recalibrating and re-running the test will resolve it.
technical_artifacts.analysis_2: The anomaly reflects a real thermal margin shortfall; a design change to improve heat dissipation is required.

technical_artifacts.situation: whether the design is ready for production release
technical_artifacts.analysis_1: The remaining risks are minor and well-mitigated; the design is ready to sign off for release now.
technical_artifacts.analysis_2: Two open risks are not yet closed; release should wait until additional verification is complete.
